overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush tropical forest with distinctive red vegetation. The character traverses a winding dirt path toward a large waterfall, with dense foliage and rocky outcrops surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with scattered red flora

events.description: first red flowering bushes become visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, navigating through tall trees and ferns

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming the forest canopy on the left side
winding dirt path with exposed roots and rocks
dense green fern undergrowth lining the path
distinctive bright red flowering vegetation on the hillside
distant rocky mountain formation visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a winding dirt trail through a dense forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. Green ferns and undergrowth fill the forest floor, while distinctive red flowering bushes begin to appear on the right side as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest slope with dense red vegetation

events.description: waterfall becomes visible in the distance between the trees
path begins ascending more steeply over rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the increasingly rocky trail, navigating around large rocks and dense vegetation

entered.detail: large reddish rocky outcrops and boulders on the left side
tall waterfall cascading down the cliff face in the distance
steep rocky cliff walls forming the canyon sides

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes more rugged as Aloy ascends a forested slope. Large rock formations appear on the left while dense red flowering vegetation dominates the right side of the path. The camera moves steadily uphill over rocky ground, and a waterfall becomes visible in the distance between the trees, marking the destination ahead.

events.description: entering the narrow canyon area at the base of the waterfall
camera tilts upward to look at the top of the waterfall

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky path toward the waterfall base, then looking up at the cascading water

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock walls forming a narrow canyon
tropical palm trees growing near the waterfall base
green vines and vegetation covering the cliff faces

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a narrow canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides, approaching the base of the large waterfall. The path becomes rockier and more enclosed by tropical vegetation including palm trees. As the character reaches the waterfall base, the camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the cascading water against the mossy cliff face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush forest that gradually transforms into a rugged canyon dominated by a massive waterfall. It begins with Aloy walking along a winding dirt trail under a canopy of tall pine trees, where dappled sunlight filters through green ferns and the first hints of red flowering bushes appear. As the character ascends a forested slope, the terrain becomes more rugged with large rock formations emerging on the left and dense red vegetation filling the right, while a distant waterfall reveals itself through the trees. The scene then shifts into a narrow canyon with steep cliff walls and tropical palm trees, guiding the camera over rocky ground toward the base of the falls. Finally, as Aloy reaches the water's edge, the camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the cascading water against a mossy cliff face.
